title: Content Development Lifecycle
description: Content must follow the plan → author → validate → review → test → publish → feedback lifecycle with appropriate phase gates.

statements.label: Planning precedes authoring
statements.requirement: Content authoring MUST NOT begin until a project plan with defined scope and team is established.

statements.label: Validation precedes review
statements.requirement: Content MUST pass automated validation (schema, FHIR, Lean) before entering formal review.

statements.label: Review precedes testing
statements.requirement: Content MUST receive formal review approval before integration testing.

statements.label: Testing precedes publication
statements.requirement: Content MUST pass all tests before publication.

statements.label: Publication requires authorization
statements.requirement: Publication MUST be authorized by the Programme Manager or designated authority.

statements.label: Feedback collected post-publication
statements.requirement: Feedback SHOULD be collected from implementers and users after publication and triaged for the next iteration.
